draft.subject: Automating your sales pipeline at Scarborough
draft.body:
Hi Richard,

In sales, every hour counts. Proposals take time to put together, follow-ups get missed, leads go cold. Most of that's manual work your team repeats every day.

We automate the proposal generation and follow-up sequencing. Your team focuses on relationships; the system keeps deals moving.

One sales team closed 15% more deals by just giving back 5 hours a week of admin time.

Want to walk through what this could look like for Scarborough Co's sales operation?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Addressed sales role, focused on proposal and follow-up automation, named the company, included concrete productivity benefit
